arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Leicester City Premier League score predicted as six-game streak ends
arts.sum: An injury-ridden Tottenham side take on Leicester City in the Premier League today, with three points vital for Ange Postecoglou's side. A dominant start from Spurs saw Postecoglou's side have 11 shots in the opening 25 minutes of the game, but it was Leicester who took the lead against the run of play, with Jamie Vardy firing past Antonin Kinsky after a long ball caught out the Spurs high line.

arts.ttl: Tottenham team confirmed vs Leicester with James Maddison out as Postecoglou makes two changes
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has had just over 48 hours to recover his tiny squad and the number of unavailable players means he has had to have to a close line-up to the one that played in Germany, with Antonin Kinsky coming between the sticks for Brandon Austin and Pape Matar Sarr is in for James Maddison who missed out entirely. Ange Postecoglou has made two changes to his Tottenham Hotspur side to host Leicester City on Sunday afternoon in the Premier League with James Maddison missing out.

arts.ttl: Tottenham are dealt yet ANOTHER injury blow - as Ange Postecoglou explains key star's absence from Leicester clash
arts.sum: The club have been dealing with a plethora of injury issues this season, often fielding a patched-up side with it, at times, feeling like players have been dropping from the squad like flies.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Spurs look for first league win in six vs. Leicester
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's Tottenham host Leicester as they search for their first Premier League win in six matches. ESPN has live action.

arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham are among the clubs to have registered an interest in the potential transfer of Feyenoord defender David Hancko, CaughtOffside understands. arts.ttl: Tottenham working to sign 13-goal star who scored a hat-trick in front of their scouts
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are keen on signing the Rangers striker Hamza Igamane. The Moroccan has done quite well for the Scottish outfit this season and he has nine goals in 12 league starts this season. Overall, he has 13 goals this season. arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Tottenham as Bobby De Cordova-Reid handed rare start
arts.sum: City (4-2-3-1): Stolarczyk; Justin, Faes, Vestergaard, Kristiansen; Winks, Soumare; Ayew, El Khannouss, De Cordova-Reid; Vardy. Bobby De Cordova-Reid has been handed his first Premier League start since August as Ruud van Nistelrooy makes one change to his Leicester City side for the fixture at Tottenham.
